user.title: Tara Polar Station Tracker
user.description: Choose how to track the Tara Polar Station. Each source requires its own API key obtained from the respective provider.

data_description.data_source: Select the service that will provide position data for the Tara Polar Station.

aisstream.title: AISStream — API Key
aisstream.description: Enter your free API key from [AISStream.io](https://aisstream.io/) (sign in with GitHub). Position updates arrive via a real-time WebSocket stream.

datalastic.title: Datalastic — API Key
datalastic.description: Enter your API key from [Datalastic.com](https://datalastic.com/). Position data is fetched via a REST API on each update cycle.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please double-check the key for the selected source.

abort.already_configured: Tara Polar Station is already configured.
